element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Fundamental combos before special moves introduced
Aggressive defensive mechanic core to counterplay
Each character has unique deflect counterattacks requiring learning curve
Multiple input methods: sweeping motions, charge moves (2 second holds), hold-and-release moves
Enables ground combos and tactical positioning advantage
Gory finisher attacks with narrative branching consequences
Triggered by certain attacks during opponent's attack animation

element_introduction_order.element: Story Mode branching (spare vs. kill decisions)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player choice between Death Combos and standard victories affects character endings
Requires secret password; only character with signature fatality

typical_relief_triggers: Knocking opponent down with Take Down move
Match victory and password save checkpoint
typical_tension_triggers: Being knocked down and vulnerable to ground combos
Mid-swing attack vulnerability window (when clothing/hair can be cut)
Approaching final Death Combo finisher decision
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Methodical one-on-one combat with reactive tension—tension builds through opponent aggression and special move strings, releases through successful defensive parries and counterattacks. Tournament structure provides macro-level progression pacing with narrative consequences for playstyle choices.

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Secret password enables Demonlord Zarak in Story Mode; additional password given at match end for mid-game save/resume

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory opponent encounters teach basic attack/defense mechanics; thrust-blocking and deflects presented early as core defensive tools
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Tournament opponents progressively require mastery of character-specific special moves and tactical ground combo follow-ups; introduces branching moral/tactical choice (spare vs. Death Combo)
difficulty_curve.late_game: Final opponents demand expertise with all 9-12 special moves per character and optimized deflect timing; Demonlord Zarak serves as prophecy-driven final challenge with unique fatality
notable_spikes: First special move opponent (jump in difficulty from basic attacks)
Tournament mid-point with increased AI aggression
Demonlord Zarak final encounter (signature fatality unique to this character)

notable_level_patterns.description: Story Mode structure: player defeats series of champion warriors in one-on-one duels. Progression builds from basic warriors toward increasingly skilled opponents, culminating in Demonlord Zarak. Victory conditional on both defeating opponent and deciding whether to finish with Death Combo (affecting story ending) or spare them.

Rather than traditional level design, gameplay rhythm cycles between offensive special move execution, defensive parry-windows, and deflect counterattack opportunities. Each character's unique deflect moves create character-specific tactical patterns.

Attacks create windows where opponents can be interrupted mid-swing, triggering cosmetic destruction (clothing/hair removal) and potential Take Down knockdowns leading to ground combos. Creates reactive, momentum-shifting micro-rhythm.
